name: Compose — Channel Picker
description: Channel picker presented as a bottom sheet from [[compose]]. Two sections — 'My Channels' (channels you belong to) and 'Following' (channels you follow) — each row showing avatar, channel name, and a short eligibility/scope sentence. Search input pinned at the top of the sheet for fast filtering. Some channels carry a small 'B' badge overlaid on the avatar (Blind-curated).

overlay.note: Triggered from the channel picker row in [[compose]]. Sheet handle (intrinsic) at top center; title left-aligned at `sys.typo.heading.lg`. Sheet supports scroll but is short-form (≤2 sections visible without scroll on tall devices).

search.note: Search input pinned below the sheet title for fast filtering. Fully rounded pill.

items.label: Design Systems
items.supportingText: Members only — your verified employer matches one of the eligibility tags.

items.label: Frontend
items.supportingText: Open to all engineers across verified companies.

body.note: Two sections in this list — 'My Channels' rows are denser-text (carry eligibility metadata); 'Following' rows are single-line. Do not normalize density. The 'B' badge overlays the thumbnail (decorator on the `thumbnail` slot, not a trailing `badge` slot). A coral 'New' `chip/tag` may sit next to channel names where applicable.

rules: This sheet's trigger lives in the channel picker row of [[compose]] — per AGENTS.md, every bottom-sheet must have a paired trigger.
The 'B' badge is a thumbnail decorator, not a separate row badge — model inside the `thumbnail` slot.
Density differs between 'My Channels' and 'Following' rows by design — do not flatten.
